lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਟੈ ਵਣਜਿ ਵਣੰਜਿਐ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਖੋਟਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: khottai vanaj vananjiai man tan khottaa hoe |
lines.english: By dealing their deals of falsehood, their minds and bodies become false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਰਾਸਿ ਨ ਸਚੁ ਹੈ ਕਿਉ ਤਿਨਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa raas na sach hai kiau tinaa sukh hoe |
lines.english: Those who do not have the Assets of Truth-how can they find peace?

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਟੇ ਪੋਤੈ ਨਾ ਪਵਹਿ ਤਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਦਰਸੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: khotte potai naa paveh tin har gur daras na hoe |
lines.english: The counterfeit coins are not put into the Treasury; they do not obtain the Blessed Vision of the Lord-Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਾਹੀ ਫਾਥੇ ਮਿਰਗ ਜਿਉ ਦੂਖੁ ਘਣੋ ਨਿਤ ਰੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: faahee faathe mirag jiau dookh ghano nit roe |2|
lines.english: Like the deer caught in the trap, they suffer in terrible agony; they continually cry out in pain. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਟੇ ਖੋਟੁ ਕਮਾਵਣਾ ਆਇ ਗਇਆ ਪਤਿ ਖੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: khotte khott kamaavanaa aae geaa pat khoe |3|
lines.english: Practicing falsehood again and again, people come and go in reincarnation, and forfeit their honor. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਟੇ ਜਾਤਿ ਨ ਪਤਿ ਹੈ ਖੋਟਿ ਨ ਸੀਝਸਿ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: khotte jaat na pat hai khott na seejhas koe |
lines.english: The false ones have no social status or honor. No one succeeds through falsehood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨੁ ਸਮਝਾਈਐ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਾਲਾਹ ॥
lines.translit: naanak man samajhaaeeai gur kai sabad saalaah |
lines.english: O Nanak, instruct your mind through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, and praise the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਤਿਆ ਭਾਰੁ ਨ ਭਰਮੁ ਤਿਨਾਹ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam rang ratiaa bhaar na bharam tinaah |
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the love of the Name of the Lord are not loaded down by doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 ghar 2 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਲਾਹਾ ਅਗਲਾ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਹਰਿ ਮਨ ਮਾਹ ॥੪॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: har jap laahaa agalaa nirbhau har man maah |4|23|
lines.english: Those who chant the Name of the Lord earn great profits; the Fearless Lord abides within their minds. ||4||23||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਜੋਬਨੁ ਅਰੁ ਫੁਲੜਾ ਨਾਠੀਅੜੇ ਦਿਨ ਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: dhan joban ar fularraa naattheearre din chaar |
lines.english: Wealth, the beauty of youth and flowers are guests for only a few days.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗੁ ਮਾਣਿ ਲੈ ਪਿਆਰਿਆ ਜਾ ਜੋਬਨੁ ਨਉ ਹੁਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: rang maan lai piaariaa jaa joban nau hulaa |
lines.english: Be happy, dear beloved, as long as your youth is fresh and delightful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਬਣਿ ਕੇਰੇ ਪਤ ਜਿਉ ਢਲਿ ਢੁਲਿ ਜੁੰਮਣਹਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: paban kere pat jiau dtal dtul junmanahaar |1|
lines.english: Like the leaves of the water-lily, they wither and fade and finally die. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਨ ਥੋੜੜੇ ਥਕੇ ਭਇਆ ਪੁਰਾਣਾ ਚੋਲਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: din thorrarre thake bheaa puraanaa cholaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: But your days are few-you have grown weary, and now your body has grown old. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਜਣ ਮੇਰੇ ਰੰਗੁਲੇ ਜਾਇ ਸੁਤੇ ਜੀਰਾਣਿ ॥
lines.translit: sajan mere rangule jaae sute jeeraan |
lines.english: My playful friends have gone to sleep in the graveyard.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀ ਨ ਸੁਣੇਹੀ ਗੋਰੀਏ ਆਪਣ ਕੰਨੀ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: kee na sunehee goree aapan kanee soe |
lines.english: Haven't you heard the call from beyond, O beautiful soul-bride?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੰ ਭੀ ਵੰਞਾ ਡੁਮਣੀ ਰੋਵਾ ਝੀਣੀ ਬਾਣਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: han bhee vanyaa ddumanee rovaa jheenee baan |2|
lines.english: In my double-mindedness, I shall have to go as well. I cry in a feeble voice. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਗੀ ਆਵਹਿ ਸਾਹੁਰੈ ਨਿਤ ਨ ਪੇਈਆ ਹੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: lagee aaveh saahurai nit na peeea hoe |3|
lines.english: You must go to your in-laws; you cannot stay with your parents forever. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਤੀ ਪੇਈਐ ਜਾਣੁ ਵਿਰਤੀ ਸੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: naanak sutee peeeai jaan viratee san |
lines.english: O Nanak, know that she who sleeps in her parents' home is plundered in broad daylight.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ਦੂਜਾ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 ghar doojaa 2 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਰਸੀਆ ਆਪਿ ਰਸੁ ਆਪੇ ਰਾਵਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape raseea aap ras aape raavanahaar |
lines.english: He Himself is the Enjoyer, and He Himself is the Enjoyment. He Himself is the Ravisher of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣਾ ਗਵਾਈ ਗੰਠੜੀ ਅਵਗਣ ਚਲੀ ਬੰਨਿ ॥੪॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: gunaa gavaaee ganttharree avagan chalee ban |4|24|
lines.english: She has lost her bouquet of merits; gathering one of demerits, she departs. ||4||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਹੋਵੈ ਚੋਲੜਾ ਆਪੇ ਸੇਜ ਭਤਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aape hovai cholarraa aape sej bhataar |1|
lines.english: He Himself is the Bride in her dress, He Himself is the Bridegroom on the bed. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗਿ ਰਤਾ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: rang rataa meraa saahib rav rahiaa bharapoor |1| rahaau |
lines.english: My Lord and Master is imbued with love; He is totally permeating and pervading all. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਜਾਲ ਮਣਕੜਾ ਆਪੇ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਲਾਲੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aape jaal manakarraa aape andar laal |2|
lines.english: He Himself is the sinker, and He Himself is the bait. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮਾਛੀ ਮਛੁਲੀ ਆਪੇ ਪਾਣੀ ਜਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape maachhee machhulee aape paanee jaal |
lines.english: He Himself is the fisherman and the fish; He Himself is the water and the net.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਰਵੈ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਦੇਖੁ ਹਮਾਰਾ ਹਾਲੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: nit ravai sohaaganee dekh hamaaraa haal |3|
lines.english: He continually ravishes and enjoys the happy soul-brides; just look at the plight I am in without Him! ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਰੰਗੁਲਾ ਸਖੀਏ ਮੇਰਾ ਲਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape bahu bidh rangulaa sakhee meraa laal |
lines.english: He Himself loves in so many ways. O sister soul-brides, He is my Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਣਵੈ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਬੇਨਤੀ ਤੂ ਸਰਵਰੁ ਤੂ ਹੰਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: pranavai naanak benatee too saravar too hans |
lines.english: Prays Nanak, please hear my prayer: You are the pool, and You are the soul-swan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਲੁ ਤੂ ਹੈ ਕਵੀਆ ਤੂ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਵੇਖਿ ਵਿਗਸੁ ॥੪॥੨੫॥
lines.translit: kaul too hai kaveea too hai aape vekh vigas |4|25|
lines.english: You are the lotus flower of the day and You are the water-lily of the night. You Yourself behold them, and blossom forth in bliss. ||4||25||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਕਿਰਸਾਣੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਜੰਮਾਇ ਲੈ ਇਉ ਪਾਵਸਿ ਪਦੁ ਨਿਰਬਾਣੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: man kirasaan har ridai jamaae lai iau paavas pad nirabaanee |1|
lines.english: Let your mind be the farmer; the Lord shall sprout in your heart, and you shall attain the state of Nirvaanaa. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਤਨੁ ਧਰਤੀ ਬੀਜੁ ਕਰਮਾ ਕਰੋ ਸਲਿਲ ਆਪਾਉ ਸਾਰਿੰਗਪਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: eihu tan dharatee beej karamaa karo salil aapaau saaringapaanee |
lines.english: Make this body the field, and plant the seed of good actions. Water it with the Name of the Lord, who holds all the world in His Hands.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 ghar 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl, Third House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਹੇ ਗਰਬਸਿ ਮੂੜੇ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kaahe garabas moorre maaeaa |
lines.english: You fool! Why are you so proud of Maya?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਤ ਸੁਤੋ ਸਗਲ ਕਾਲਤ੍ਰ ਮਾਤਾ ਤੇਰੇ ਹੋਹਿ ਨ ਅੰਤਿ ਸਖਾਇਆ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: pit suto sagal kaalatr maataa tere hohi na ant sakhaaeaa | rahaau |
lines.english: Father, children, spouse, mother and all relatives-they shall not be your helpers in the end. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੈ ਬਿਕਾਰ ਦੁਸਟ ਕਿਰਖਾ ਕਰੇ ਇਨ ਤਜਿ ਆਤਮੈ ਹੋਇ ਧਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: bikhai bikaar dusatt kirakhaa kare in taj aatamai hoe dhiaaee |
lines.english: So weed out evil, wickedness and corruption; leave these behind, and let your soul meditate on God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੀਸ ਸਪਤਾਹਰੋ ਬਾਸਰੋ ਸੰਗ੍ਰਹੈ ਤੀਨਿ ਖੋੜਾ ਨਿਤ ਕਾਲੁ ਸਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: bees sapataaharo baasaro sangrahai teen khorraa nit kaal saarai |
lines.english: Bring the twenty-seven elements of the body under your control, and throughout the three stages of life, remember death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪੁ ਤਪੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਹੋਹਿ ਜਬ ਰਾਖੇ ਕਮਲੁ ਬਿਗਸੈ ਮਧੁ ਆਸ੍ਰਮਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jap tap sanjam hohi jab raakhe kamal bigasai madh aasramaaee |2|
lines.english: When chanting, austere meditation and self-discipline become your protectors, then the lotus blossoms forth, and the honey trickles out. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਸ ਅਠਾਰ ਮੈ ਅਪਰੰਪਰੋ ਚੀਨੈ ਕਹੈ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਇਵ ਏਕੁ ਤਾਰੈ ॥੩॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: das atthaar mai aparanparo cheenai kahai naanak iv ek taarai |3|26|
lines.english: See the Infinite Lord in the ten directions, and in all the variety of nature. Says Nanak, in this way, the One Lord shall carry you across. ||3||26||
